author: lOrm
content:
Phase 2 tests implemented and passing.

**Test count delta:** +58 new tests (50 unit + 8 integration). Previous count: 809; new count: 867 in the lib suite + 8 in file_tools_integration + 15 in the file_tools integration_tests module.

**Files written:**
- src/tools/file/read.rs — #[cfg(test)] mod tests (17 unit tests)
- src/tools/file/edit.rs — #[cfg(test)] mod tests (9 unit tests)
- src/tools/file/write.rs — #[cfg(test)] mod tests (7 unit tests)
- src/tools/file/notebook.rs — #[cfg(test)] mod tests (17 unit tests, incl. source_to_line_array)
- tests/file_tools_integration.rs (new, 8 integration tests)

**Behavior → test mapping:**
- B1 (offset/limit): read_text_no_offset_returns_all_lines, read_text_offset_1_is_first_line, read_text_offset_and_limit_returns_correct_slice, read_text_line_numbers_use_original_numbering, read_text_offset_zero_treated_as_start_of_file, read_text_offset_beyond_eof_returns_empty_body, read_text_limit_zero_returns_empty_body, read_text_missing_file_returns_error + integration: read_offset_beyond_eof_is_non_error + write_read_edit_read_cross_tool_flow
- B2 (image base64): read_image_returns_base64_text_block, read_image_empty_file_returns_ok_with_empty_base64, read_image_nonexistent_returns_error + integration: read_image_extensions_dispatched_as_image
- B3 (PDF page range): parse_page_range_single_page, parse_page_range_range, parse_page_range_with_whitespace, parse_page_range_page_zero_is_error, parse_page_range_inverted_range_is_error, parse_page_range_non_numeric_is_error
- B4 (edit not-found): edit_old_string_not_found_returns_error, edit_old_string_not_found_does_not_modify_file, edit_curly_quote_not_normalized_returns_error, edit_old_equals_new_succeeds_if_present + integration flow
- B5 (replace_all gap #569): edit_replace_all_true_with_multi_occurrence_currently_errors, edit_replace_all_true_single_occurrence_succeeds_flag_ignored, edit_multi_occurrence_without_replace_all_errors, edit_single_occurrence_succeeds + integration: edit_replace_all_multi_occurrence_currently_errors
- B6 (write parent-dir): write_creates_parent_directories_recursively, write_success_message_contains_byte_count_and_path, write_parent_already_exists_is_idempotent, write_overwrites_existing_file, write_empty_content_succeeds, write_missing_content_arg_returns_error, write_missing_path_arg_returns_error + integration: write_creates_deeply_nested_parent_directories
- B7 (notebook cell_id + fallback): notebook_replace_by_cell_id_succeeds, notebook_replace_by_cell_id_not_found_returns_error, notebook_replace_by_cell_number_succeeds, notebook_replace_without_cell_id_or_number_errors, notebook_replace_out_of_bounds_returns_error_not_insert, notebook_replace_code_cell_does_not_reset_outputs, notebook_insert_without_cell_id_inserts_at_position_zero, notebook_insert_after_cell_id_inserts_at_next_position, notebook_delete_by_cell_id_removes_correct_cell, notebook_invalid_json_returns_error, notebook_invalid_edit_mode_returns_error
- B8 (truncation): read_text_large_file_truncated_as_non_error, read_text_within_cap_not_truncated + integration: read_large_file_truncated_as_non_error
- Gap #567 (GlobTool missing): glob_tool_not_exported_from_file_module
- Gap #568 (GrepTool missing): grep_tool_not_exported_from_file_module

**cargo build:** PASS. **cargo test:** PASS (867+8+131 tests, 1 pre-existing ignore). **cargo clippy --tests -D warnings:** no new errors in any new/modified test file. **cargo fmt --check:** PASS for all new test files. **No production code modified.**

**#[allow] annotations added:** none.

**New gap issues filed:** none — all divergences were already documented in #525, #567, #568, #569.
